metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Alert Event ASIM parser for Google Threat Intelligence
properties.query:
let AlertStatusLookup = datatable(state:string, AlertStatus:string)
  [
  "STATE_UNSPECIFIED", "Active",
  "NEW", "Active",
  "READ", "Active",
  "TRIAGED", "Active",
  "ESCALATED", "Active",
  "RESOLVED", "Closed",
  "DUPLICATE", "Closed",
  "FALSE_POSITIVE", "Closed",
  "NOT_ACTIONABLE", "Closed",
  "BENIGN", "Closed",
  "TRACKED_EXTERNALLY", "Closed"
  ];
let AlertVerdictLookup = datatable(state:string, AlertVerdict:string)
  [
  "FALSE_POSITIVE", "False Positive",
  "BENIGN", "Benign Positive",
  "RESOLVED", "True Positive"
  ];
let parser = (disabled: bool=false, pack: bool=false) {
    RelevanceSystemAlerts_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    | lookup AlertStatusLookup on state
    | lookup AlertVerdictLookup on state
    | extend AlertVerdict = coalesce(AlertVerdict, "Unknown")
    | extend
        EventSeverity = case(
            severityAnalysis_severityLevel == "SEVERITY_LEVEL_CRITICAL", "High",
            severityAnalysis_severityLevel == "SEVERITY_LEVEL_HIGH", "High",
            severityAnalysis_severityLevel == "SEVERITY_LEVEL_MEDIUM", "Medium",
            severityAnalysis_severityLevel == "SEVERITY_LEVEL_LOW", "Low",
            "Informational"
        )
    | extend
        ThreatCategory = case(
            detail_detailType == "data_leak", "Security Policy Violation",
            detail_detailType == "initial_access_broker", "Phishing",
            detail_detailType == "insider_threat", "Security Policy Violation",
            "Unknown"
        )
    | project-rename
        AlertName = displayName
    | extend
        EventVendor = 'Google',
        EventProduct = 'Google Threat Intelligence',
        EventSchema = 'AlertEvent',
        EventSchemaVersion = '0.1',
        EventType = 'Alert',
        EventCount = coalesce(toint(findingCount), int(1)),
        EventStartTime = todatetime(audit_createTime),
        EventEndTime = todatetime(audit_updateTime),
        EventUid = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]),
        EventOriginalSeverity = severityAnalysis_severityLevel,
        EventOriginalType = detail_detailType,
        EventOriginalUid = name,
        EventMessage = aiSummary,
        AlertOriginalStatus = state,
        EventSubType = case(
            detail_detailType == "data_leak", "Threat",
            detail_detailType == "initial_access_broker", "Threat",
            detail_detailType == "insider_threat", "Threat",
            "Suspicious Activity"
        ),
        DetectionMethod = 'Threat Intelligence',
        RuleDescription = priorityAnalysis_reasoning
    | extend
        ThreatOriginalCategory = detail_detailType,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel = priorityAnalysis_priorityLevel,
        ThreatOriginalConfidence = relevanceAnalysis_confidence,
        ThreatConfidence = case(
            relevanceAnalysis_confidence == "CONFIDENCE_LEVEL_HIGH", int(90),
            relevanceAnalysis_confidence == "CONFIDENCE_LEVEL_MEDIUM", int(60),
            relevanceAnalysis_confidence == "CONFIDENCE_LEVEL_LOW", int(30),
            int(50)
        ),
        ThreatRiskLevel = case(
            priorityAnalysis_priorityLevel == "PRIORITY_LEVEL_CRITICAL", int(100),
            priorityAnalysis_priorityLevel == "PRIORITY_LEVEL_HIGH", int(75),
            priorityAnalysis_priorityLevel == "PRIORITY_LEVEL_MEDIUM", int(50),
            priorityAnalysis_priorityLevel == "PRIORITY_LEVEL_LOW", int(25),
            int(0)
        ),
        ThreatFirstReportedTime = todatetime(audit_createTime),
        ThreatLastReportedTime = todatetime(audit_updateTime),
        ThreatIsActive = iff(state in ("STATE_UNSPECIFIED", "NEW", "READ", "TRIAGED", "ESCALATED"), true, false)
    | extend
        AdditionalFields = iif(
            pack, bag_pack(
                "etag", etag,
                "findings", findings,
                "discoveryDocumentIds", coalesce(
                    detail_dataLeak_discoveryDocumentIds,
                    detail_initialAccessBroker_discoveryDocumentIds,
                    detail_insiderThreat_discoveryDocumentIds
                ),
                "relevanceLevel", relevanceAnalysis_relevanceLevel,
                "relevanceRelevant", relevanceAnalysis_relevant,
                "relevanceReasoning", relevanceAnalysis_reasoning,
                "commonThemes", relevanceAnalysis_evidence_commonThemes,
                "distinctThemes", relevanceAnalysis_evidence_distinctThemes,
                "severityReasoning", severityAnalysis_reasoning,
                "severityConfidence", severityAnalysis_confidence,
                "priorityReasoning", priorityAnalysis_reasoning
            ),
            dynamic(null)
        )
    | extend
        AlertId = EventUid,
        AlertDescription = EventMessage
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        AdditionalFields,
        AlertDescription,
        AlertId,
        AlertName,
        AlertOriginalStatus,
        AlertStatus,
        AlertVerdict,
        DetectionMethod,
        EventCount,
        EventEndTime,
        EventMessage,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventProduct,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventSeverity,
        EventStartTime,
        EventSubType,
        EventType,
        EventUid,
        EventVendor,
        RuleDescription,
        ThreatCategory,
        ThreatConfidence,
        ThreatFirstReportedTime,
        ThreatIsActive,
        ThreatLastReportedTime,
        ThreatOriginalCategory,
        ThreatOriginalConfidence,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
        ThreatRiskLevel
};
parser(disabled = disabled, pack = pack)
